items.title: Trump’s Slimy Pool Breeds Memes
items.summary: An interview with Flavia Rando, Danielle De Jesus at the Knicks parade, and the great Reflecting Pool fiasco.

items.title: Marc Spiegler Got It All Wrong
items.summary: In a guest essay for the New York Times, the former Art Basel global director presented a vision of a Brave New Art World that has little to do with art and those who make it.

items.title: Historic Brooklyn Church Destroyed by “Devastating” Fire
items.summary: The South Bushwick Community Church’s signature octagonal spire collapsed during a three-alarm blaze on Friday.

items.title: Capturing New York Pride at the Historic Knicks Parade
items.summary: We ate bacon, egg, and cheese sandwiches and got to school by swiping MetroCards. We have our own language, style, and unmatched pride. We call NYC home.
